emails.subject: US Gas Ticker
emails.body: US Gas Ticker Fletch, Please review the attached New ticker item that will go out on the web. Thank you, Melba Changes to US Gas Product Descriptions In order to improve the clarity of the Product description on the website, please note that effective September 6, 2000 the description for: _ US Gas Basis GD/D HeHub-Chic has been changed to US Gas Basis GD/D Chic-HHub _ US Gas Basis GD/D HHub-SoCal has been changed to US Gas Basis GD/D SoCal-HHub _ US Gas Basis HeHub has been changed to US Gas Basis HHub _ US Gas Daily CNG South-HeHub has been changed to US Gas Daily GD/D CNGAp-HHub _ US Gas Daily G/D HeHub-Chic has been changed to US Gas Daily GD/D Chic-HHub _ US Gas Daily HSC-HeHub has been changed to US Gas Daily GD/D HSC-HHub _ US Gas Daily HeHub has been changed to US Gas Daily HHub _ US Gas Daily TCO-HeHub has been changed to US Gas Daily GD/D TecoP-HHub _ US Gas Daily TX E M3 HeHub has been changed to US Gas Daily GD/D TETM3-HHub _ US Gas Daily TranscoZ6 HeHub has been changed to US Gas Daily GD/D TZ3-HHub _ US Gas Daily Waha HeHub has been changed to US Gas Daily GD/D Waha-Hhub _ US Gas Phy HeHub has been changed to US Gas Phy Hhub _ US Gas Phy Index ANR SE Pool NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index ANRSE Pool NXL1 _ US Gas Phy Index CNG SP TT NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index CNG SP TT NXL1 _ US Gas Phy Index CNG/Sab SP NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index CNG/Sab SP NXL1 _ US Gas Phy Index Consumers NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index Consumers NXL1 _ US Gas Phy Index Mich Con NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index Mich Con NXL1 _ US Gas Phy Index NGPL LA NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index NGPL LA NXL1 _ US Gas Phy Index NGPL STX NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index NGPL STX NXL1 _ US Gas Phy Index NGPL TxOkGC NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index NGPLTxOkGC NXL1 _ US Gas Phy Index TCO Pool NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index TCO Pool NXL1 _ US Gas Phy Index TETCO M3 NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index TETCO M3 NXL1 _ US Gas Phy Index TRKELA TAB1 NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index TRKELATAB1 NXL1 _ US Gas Phy Index TransZ6NNY NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index TranZ6NNY NXL1 US Gas Phy Index TranscoZ6NY NL1 has been changed to US Gas Phy Index TransZ6NY NXL1
